name: Mad River - SR 29 / SR 296 access (north of Urbana)
notes: ODNR parking lot with steps to the river on the brown trout water.

name: Mad River - US 36 bridge access
notes: One of the mapped Champaign County bridge access points on the Mad.

name: Mohican State Park covered bridge (Clear Fork)
notes: Gorge water below Pleasant Hill Dam; brown trout section.

name: Antrim Park lot (Antrim Lake)
notes: Off Olentangy River Rd, Columbus; shoreline fishing for spring rainbow releases.

name: Olander Park (Olander Lake)
notes: Sylvania park; bank fishing for spring rainbow releases.

name: Mt. Gilead State Park Lake shore
notes: State park lake on the ODNR spring trout release list.
